label: Test bot KPI framework
description: Canonical KPI weighting for sensible automated playtests. The bot should optimize across multiple player goals rather than pure profit, with small randomized shifts to create nearby strategy variants.

scenario_reach.note: Use as a local decision metric when comparing scenario solutions or carry-over options. Do not treat it as a replacement for the higher-level run KPIs.

scenario_effectiveness.note: Use as a local decision metric when comparing scenario solutions or carry-over options. Do not treat it as a replacement for the higher-level run KPIs.

variantGeneration.purpose: Create nearby sensible strategy variants for automated testing without collapsing into a single dominant objective.
rules: Start from perKpiWeights as the baseline.
For a variant, randomly boost one KPI slightly and reduce the remaining KPIs slightly so total weight stays at 1.0.
Keep perturbations small enough that the tier structure still dominates.
Do not produce a variant that zeroes out any KPI.
Prefer testing multiple nearby variants rather than a single rigid policy.
